description: Meetup event page is parseable; details link strips tracking params and markdown links in the description become HTML anchors (Fusion LA Israel, Jun 7 2026)

events.title: The New VC Playbook - Investing in vibe coders, solo-founders & builders
events.details: https://www.meetup.com/fusion-la-israel/events/314842056 ‚ÄãFusion VC, Google for Startups, Poalim Tech and AI Builders Israel invite you to a special morning event focused on one of the biggest shifts happening in the startup ecosystem right now: ‚Äã***The rise of AI-native builders, solo founders, vibe coders, and lean startup teams building faster than ever before.*** ‚ÄãAs AI tools reshape product development, distribution, and company building, the traditional venture capital playbook is evolving as well. ## ‚ÄãRSVP HERE * ‚ÄãWhat does the next generation of startups look like? * ‚ÄãWhat are investors looking for in 2026? * ‚ÄãCan solo founders build venture-scale companies? * ‚ÄãAnd how should founders think about fundraising, velocity, and execution in the AI era? ‚ÄãJoin leading founders, operators, and investors for an honest discussion about the future of building and investing. ## ‚ÄãWhat We‚Äôll Cover: * ‚ÄãThe new pre-seed benchmarks in the AI era * ‚ÄãHow AI-native startups are built differently * ‚ÄãSolo founders vs. traditional teams * ‚ÄãThe rise of vibe coding and ultra-lean execution * ‚ÄãWhat top VCs are looking for in 2026 * ‚ÄãHow founders can move faster with AI tools * ‚ÄãReal lessons from builders already scaling AI products ## ‚ÄãAgenda ‚Äã10:00-10:10 - Opening Remarks ‚Äã\*\*Seffi Tsarfati\*\* Head of Strategic Partnerships, VC & Startups Google ‚Äã10:00-10:30 - The New Pre-Seed Benchmarks ‚Äã\*\*Amit Shechter\*\* Principal Fusion VC ‚Äã10:30-11:15 - Founders & Builders Panel ‚Äã\*\*Ben Lavi\*\* Founder, nCode 5 Micro SaaS Founder ‚Äã\*\*Niv Abutbul\*\* Co-Founder & CTO Kadabra AI ‚Äã\*\*Stav Brener\*\* Founder Automagic ‚Äã\*\*Yahav Fuchs\*\* Founder ReddGrow AI ‚ÄãModerator: Heli Netanel Co-Founder & CPO Automation Flow ‚Äã11:15-12:00 - Investors Panel - The New Playbook ‚Äã\*\*Lia Cromwell\*\* Partner UpWest VC ‚Äã\*\*Roni Bonjack\*\* Founder & Managing Partner Stealth VC ‚Äã\*\*Yael Alroy\*\* Managing Partner Stardom VC ‚ÄãModerator: Adi Hoorvitch Lavi, PhD SVP Poalim Tech ## ‚ÄãWho Should Attend * ‚ÄãEarly-stage founders * ‚ÄãAI builders & developers * ‚ÄãSolo founders * ‚ÄãStartup operators * ‚ÄãCTOs & product leaders * ‚ÄãInvestors interested in the future of AI-native startups ## ‚ÄãRSVP HERE ‚ÄãThe event is free of charge, but registration is required and subject to approval due to limited capacity. Location Google for Startups Campus Ha-Umanim St 12, Tel Aviv-Yafo, 6789731, Israel

times.location: Google for Startups, 12 HaOmanim st., Tel-Aviv, al
